notes: Clip metadata now actually lands on your Resolve clips — descriptions, tags, mood, shot type, speakers, alias, and analysis markers all sync, Resync backfills every already-synced clip (and skips unchanged ones), and the app offers a resync when analysis finishes. New: Rewalk timeline builds a fresh versioned time-of-day timeline with gyro-steady trims and markers on the clips — your original timeline is never touched. Timestamped transcripts: Copy transcript in the clip inspector and Export transcripts… in the YouTube tool produce readable [MM:SS] paragraphs. Rough Cut: 'Keep original tracks' replaces Preserve multicam, and the b-roll cap + stability-trim toggles moved into its dialog. Also: describes wait for the GPU instead of failing en masse, faster clip placement during ingest, the Open sidecar button works again, and backup/project tiles no longer show 0 clips after an ingest.
